curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which modifies only _make_file_path in mesop/server/state_session.py. The advisory also explicitly names this function and the FileStateSessionBackend class. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern — the MemoryStateSessionBackend uses dict keys rather than file paths and is not susceptible to path traversal. Pre-assigned class path-traversal confirmed by CWE-22, advisory description, and patch diff which adds token validation and resolved-path containment checks.
